reviews.review_description:
I 
got the game, I'm stuck in the intro. I've hit every bas
ket from small to large, I'm still stuck at the gazebo. With no buttons or ways to do anything else. Doing a live stream, this was beyond embarrassing as I checked every button on the controller, hit every post, and still stuck at the gazebo. 

I don't mean to be mean, but I wanted to just play. If 3 hours plus instruction is the best way to start? I'm concerned, and will ask for a refund. Don't want to, but this seems beyond unreasonable. Atleast ask before you trap us. 

But now I can't move from the intro.  I hope someone can help with that.

developer_response.body: Apologies, as we are still working on improving the instructions to better explain how the menu is accessed. The startup tips explain that the main menu is attached to your left wrist, and appears when you stare at it. If you look at your wrist (similar to looking at a watch), you will see your main menu popup. You can then use your right controller to select options using the red selection indicator. If you continue to have trouble, please hop on our discord, we would be happy to help you out!

reviews.review_description:
I live in norway, North in norway, so in the Winther there is no way to Play Discgolf 😕 but this game is a gamechanger! It actually feels like throwing a disc in real life😃 

I only wish there where an option to choose meter instead of feet…
That would be awesome!
We don’t use feet in europe, so it is a little bit confusing and difficult to choose the right disc when you don’t know the right distanse 😋 

Thank you so much for this game!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! A settings option to switch from feet to meters is long overdue. I will make sure to include this in the next update!

reviews.review_title: Best disc golf VR I have played so far.
reviews.review_description: I would love a texture update and some kind of instructions on how to throw 100% power.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review! We're looking at better options for models/textures at the moment. As for throwing 100% power, try to slow down and time the release. It is very specific, but once you find the sweet spot, you'll be hitting 100% easily! You're also welcome to our discord (found in the "About" section of the help menu) if you need additional help.

reviews.review_description: Initially I struggled to figure out the throwing methods but eventually learned how to deploy the sling-shot technique which suddenly made this game a lot of fun. Hoping the developer will provide overhead layout maps for each hole as it’s often not possible to determine where to aim shots unless time is spent teleporting around the course before taking shots. Also would like to be presented with the max yardage for each disc to aid in picking the best disc for each shot. Lastly, yardage remaining to the target after every shot would be very helpful. I highly recommend this game if you have the patience to study the controls diagram and put in some practice time on the driving range.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the honest feedback! We are currently experimenting with a way to help improve throw accuracy for those new to the game. We're planning to roll this out in the next update, so we're hoping you find it useful! There is a plan to add an overhead map of the course, but we'll bump it forward in the queue, as we've seen more interest in this lately. In the current version, if you press "B" to highlight the basket, it should also tell you the distance. If you have any more feedback or suggestions, we'd appreciate you joining our discord! The link to join can be found on the in-game Help menu under the "About" section.

reviews.review_title: Finally a great Disc Golf game
reviews.review_description:
This game's physics are near perfect. And playing multiplayer with friends is really fun. I love that you can generate random courses. If they add in more variables to the course generator then this will easily become one of the most fun VR games.

Also really cool that you can make custom discs with custom stats. Don't let the graphics turn you off. This game has it where it counts.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We most definitely plan to improve and extend the capabilities of the procedural course generator, as well as add more custom courses

reviews.review_description: This game has been amazing this winter and friends and I try and play at least 4 times a week. I wish there was a way to see how far the water is from Tee so you know where to land your shot. Keep up the good work devs.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review! Keep an eye out for the next update, we will be adding some features that will help with the problem you've described

reviews.review_title: Fun Game! So Excited About This Game!
reviews.review_description:
Finally! A disc golf game for the Quest. This is such a fun game! The physics are different than a real disc golf game, but it's still a great game. 

I know the game is still in development, so here are a few of my small requests. #1: Could you please have the disc golf bag sit on the ground once you pick up a disc to throw. #2: More customization for discs and avatars.

Thanks for an awesome game!

developer_response.body: That's a fantastic suggestion! Thank you for the review as well, we'll look into making that an option. More disc stamps and avatars to come!

reviews.review_description: The courses I've played have been fantastic. Once I've played all the courses, they have an option to play procedurally generated courses so you never run out of courses to play. I'm not great but I still have fun. Being early It has some minor bugs and is unpolished but I'd say better than most in early access

developer_response.body: Thank you! We appreciate the review, and we will definitely be pushing out more content and bug fixes!

reviews.review_description: This is the best and most realistic VR disc golf game (I've tried them all at this point). Procedural generated courses available, and a disc creator based on real-life flight numbers that actually fly like the real thing. Tons of replayability and very responsive/dedicated devs. Pick this one up if you're a disc golfer or want to give it a try!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! More courses and content to come!

reviews.review_title: The DG game you’ve been looking for!
reviews.review_description: I’m an avid disc golfer in real life, that being said I am a harsh critic of VR disc golf. This game is incredibly good, going to get better, and will provide hours of entertainment whether you play IRL or just want a fun sports game. I can’t wait to see what this game ultimately becomes because it’s really solid right now. Great physics (very important), 3 courses so far plus randomly generated procedural courses, a driving range, and a putting competition all keep you coming back for more. Please support this game, the developer seems to have worked very hard to give us something special and it deserves to be seen and played by the masses.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! We hope to continue to improve this game with the help of the community for a long time to come!

reviews.review_description: How do you join online mode I can’t figure it out

developer_response.body: On the main menu, which pops up when you look at your left wrist, you will see a Multiplayer Option you can select. The following menu will ask for a room code. If you and a friend join the same room code and use the same region, you should see each other in the starting putting area. Please reach out on our Discord if you have any additional questions. You can find the discord link in the game under the Help -> About menu.

reviews.review_title: Best VR disc golf game ive tried!
reviews.review_description: I’ve been searching for a VR disc golf game that tickles the need for a round on a rainy day and I wasn’t disappointed purchasing this game I have tried multiple other games and nothing hit like this one! It’s on its way up and the developer is amazing with listening and taking in ideas and implementing them into the game! If your looking for that hidden gem for a VR disc golf game this is the place to be! And forgot to mention I have yet to play a game that matches the true physics of disc golf and I’m happy to say this man is making the game head in the right direction!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! We look forward to making future updates that improve your experience as well!

reviews.review_description: I'm really enjoying this game. It's a good disc golf simulation, but it has some flaws and bugs. The chain sound should be louder. Sometimes if your disc ends up in water you can get stuck in it. The AI is a bit too good. They make par often at 40% skill, which doesn't seem right. Sometimes if you pick up the disc after you finish the hole, and put it back in the basket, you get a hole in one on the next hole. And I can't figure out how to use a muligan. Other than those things, it's quite good and fun!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the honest review! I will look into improving the AI scoring. I agree it should bogey more often at lower skill levels. Increasing chain sound volume is a solid idea. I haven't been able to reproduce the issue you describe with the hole-in-one on the next hole, but I will keep trying. If you have a chance to join the discord, I can provide more direct assistance with that issue. When mulligans are enabled, press "B" on the right controller to mulligan before the disc comes to rest. I am looking into creating a popup to help users understand the controls more easily. Thanks again for playing!

reviews.review_title: This gave me all the feels
reviews.review_description: This had all the good feelings of disc golf, I really love the live disc tracker and rendom generated courses. I would love to see a public meeting hub for finding fellow golfers in game. Great game and cant wait for its future.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review, we really appreciate the encouragement! We're looking into better ways to improve multiplayer matchmaking, more to come for sure.

reviews.review_description:
Really quick first impressions:

Enjoying it immensely, first time trying it and I didn't stop till my Quest battery ran out. 

Like it much better than Off The Chains,( it never felt right to me.)

Throwing feels really good.

First course is fun.

Still working on getting the maximum throwing strength dialed in.

Graphics are fine to get you immersed.



Questions for Devs:

Is there a way to play with just one controller while you are on the course? I am currently having to put the left controller in my pocket when I am getting ready to throw.

Is there a way to continue a game in progress if you have to quit? 

Will your course/hole score, longest putt be saved,so you can try to beat your personal best or will you  even have leaderboards?



All in all I am really impressed. Congrats on the launch.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind review, and we appreciate the encouragement! In regards to your questions:

Q- Is there a way to play the game with only one controller?
A- At the moment, there is not a way to play with only one hand, due to navigational controls and scorecard being tied to the left/right controllers. We will look into adding more ways to customize controls so this would be possible (while out on the course specifically)

Q- Is there a way to continue a game in progress if you have to quit? 
A- Not at the moment, but this is high up on our list, and will be added in a future update.

Q- Will your course/hole score, longest putt be saved?
A- There are most definitely plans to add an online leaderboard (especially for the course of the day!). Recording on-the-course statistics and allow you view/beat your personal bests is also high up there on our to-do list.

Thanks for playing and for the all the great suggestions! We also have our discord server linked in the game's "Help -> About" menu if you would like to discuss further.

reviews.review_description: Play the first hole. Then never advances to next hole.

developer_response.body: Happy to help you with your issue! After the disc is at rest in the basket, and your score shows above it, you can press the trigger on the left controller to advance to the next hole. If you're having any more issues, please join our discord ( link found in the Settings->About section of the game), and we can assist you further.
